title: gymnadenia austriaca var. iberica
intro: Gymnadenia austriaca var. iberica, also known as the iberian gymnadenia, is a subspecies of orchid native to the mountainous regions of the Caucasus and the Black Sea coast. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are derived from its alkaloid content. The iberian gymnadenia is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. It is commonly prepared in herbal form, including dried flowers, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically proven.
